---
title: "Resources"
subtitle: "A collection of useful resources on programming, R, and statistics that I've accumulated over the years. By [Sereina M. Graber](https://serigra.github.io/Webpage_Quarto/)."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    theme: styles_resources.scss
    backgroundcolor: "#f8f8f6"
    include-after-body: 
      text: |
        <footer style="text-align: center; padding: 1em 0;">
          <p>©2025 &middot; Made with <a href="https://www.r-project.org/"> <img src="https://www.r-project.org/Rlogo.png" alt="R" width="25" style="vertical-align: middle;"></a> and <a href="https://quarto.org/"><img src="https://quarto.org/quarto.png" alt="Quarto" width="65" style="vertical-align: middle;"></a>.</p>
        </footer>
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
engine: knitr
---


```{r}
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)
```


```{r}
# read in csv file with resources
d.resources <- read.csv("stats_resources.csv", header = TRUE) 

# Create compact reactable with search and filtering
reactable(
  d.resources,
  searchable = TRUE,
  filterable = TRUE,
  defaultPageSize = 15,
  compact = TRUE,
  striped = TRUE,
  highlight = TRUE,
  bordered = FALSE,
  resizable = TRUE,
  
  # Column definitions for better formatting
  columns = list(
    type = colDef(
      name = "Type",
      maxWidth = 120,
      style = list(fontSize = "13px", fontWeight = "500"),
      filterInput = function(values, name) {
        tags$select(
          onchange = sprintf("Reactable.setFilter('%s', '%s', event.target.value)", 
                           "resources-table", name),
          tags$option(value = "", "All"),
          lapply(unique(values), tags$option)
        )
      }
    ),
    
    topic = colDef(
      name = "Topic",
      maxWidth = 150,
      style = list(fontSize = "13px"),
      filterInput = function(values, name) {
        tags$select(
          onchange = sprintf("Reactable.setFilter('%s', '%s', event.target.value)", 
                           "resources-table", name),
          tags$option(value = "", "All"),
          lapply(unique(sort(values)), tags$option)
        )
      }
    ),
    
    title = colDef(
      name = "Title",
      minWidth = 200,
      style = list(fontSize = "13px", fontWeight = "400")
    ),
    
    link = colDef(
      name = "Link",
      minWidth = 100,
      cell = function(value) {
        # Create clickable link that opens in new tab
        tags$a(
          href = value, 
          target = "_blank",
          style = "color: #0066cc; text-decoration: none; font-size: 13px;",
          "Visit →"
        )
      },
      html = TRUE
    )
  ),
  
  # Table styling
  theme = reactableTheme(
    borderColor = "#dfe2e5",
    stripedColor = "#f6f8fa",
    highlightColor = "#f0f5ff",
    cellPadding = "6px 10px",
    style = list(
      fontFamily = "-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif",
      fontSize = "14px"
    ),
    searchInputStyle = list(
      width = "100%",
      padding = "6px 10px",
      fontSize = "13px",
      border = "1px solid #dfe2e5",
      borderRadius = "4px"
    )
  ),
  
  # Table ID for reference
  elementId = "resources-table",
  
  # Summary text
  defaultColDef = colDef(
    headerStyle = list(
      background = "#f6f8fa",
      fontWeight = "600",
      fontSize = "13px",
      borderBottom = "2px solid #dfe2e5"
    )
  ),
  
  # Show total entries
  language = reactableLang(
    searchPlaceholder = "Search resources...",
    noData = "No resources found",
    pageInfo = "{rowStart}–{rowEnd} of {rows} resources",
    pagePrevious = "‹",
    pageNext = "›"
  )
)

```
